---
title: "Launching the IAWEL Student Conference"
date: '2026-06-03'
categories: 
  - 2026
---

We are delighted to announce that the first International Animal Welfare Ethics and Law Student Conference will run on the 15th September, 2026.

The conference itself is open to current IAWEL students only, however, we will share the abstract book and abstract presentations shortly.
